title: An Unexpected Revelation
wikitext:
[]: An Unexpected Revelation...             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Sep 15, 2009 7:43 am Surely someone must have spotted this before, but just in case, and for those who didn't, I present to you this Pay special note the value between datenkompression and prufers zur bestatigung Now it all makes sense...wait, no it doesn't! This just raises further questions! Is this multi-classing? Secret lineage? Why is it higher than Yoda's?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Sep 15, 2009 9:57 am Heh! Yeah, that's come up a couple of times. It's always good for a laugh.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Sep 15, 2009 10:03 am Fucking Jedi!

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Sep 15, 2009 10:09 am They should've turned him into a Darth Toji cyborg. Sure NERV can create artificial giant human monsters, but they can't grow a leg back.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 15, 2009 1:31 pm The force is strong in this one.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Sep 15, 2009 2:06 pm I wonder if the Eva pilots could possibly be decendents of the Jedi? This could lead to a potentially awsome/crappy Eva-Star Wars cross-over!

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Tue Sep 15, 2009 9:05 pm Well, it has been said that Gendo is Darth Vader in shades, but... I'd guess that midichlorians are what allow the children to pilot the Evas. Why? 'Cause given their Star Wars meaning, it makes sense. Kind of. You know, like Life Sympathy or whatever.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Sep 15, 2009 10:49 pm I don't know who did this brilliant shoop, but it feels like an appropriate time to share:

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 15, 2009 10:59 pm Oh God! How appropriate. She IS a "master"

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Sep 15, 2009 11:00 pm And much easier on the eyes then Obi-wan.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Sep 15, 2009 11:01 pm We need a Darth Gendo, A Obi Wan Fuyutsuki, and a Shinji Skywalker.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 16, 2009 1:21 am Sammaeloo wrote: We need a Darth Gendo, A Obi Wan Fuyutsuki, and a Shinji Skywalker.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Sep 16, 2009 2:02 am Hell, one of Eva's source material's thought of that one .

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Thu Sep 24, 2009 12:15 pm Apparently I didn't pay enough attention to star wars the last time I saw it, could someone please explain?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Sep 24, 2009 1:36 pm Iam(not)toji wrote: Apparently I didn't pay enough attention to star wars the last time I saw it, could someone please explain?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Sep 24, 2009 1:54 pm Gendou: Touji, I'm your father.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Sep 24, 2009 3:14 pm The bigger question is who would be Chewbacca?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Sep 24, 2009 3:21 pm Sammaeloo wrote: The bigger question is who would be Chewbacca?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Sep 24, 2009 4:00 pm Sammaeloo wrote: The bigger question is who would be Chewbacca?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Sep 24, 2009 4:08 pm Damn, your right. How could I forget about Pen-Pen.
